objective: Strategie de Momentum / Volatility sur 0GUSDC 3m. Indicateurs : OBV, EMA(20), ATR. Entree short quand baisse accompagnee de volume (OBV chute) et prix sous EMA(20). Stop-loss = 2.0x ATR, take-profit = 5.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining momentum (OBV) and volatility (ATR) indicators can help identify potential trend reversals with appropriate stop-loss and take-profit levels.
